safe.not_moving: Not move at all; the vehicle should stay stationary, waiting because a pedestrian is crossing.
safe.stopping: Stop; the vehicle should reduce its speed and come to a complete stop because a pedestrian is crossing.
safe.wait_then_move: Wait (remain stopped) then move after ensuring the pedestrian has finished crossing and it's safe to proceed.
safe.slowing_down_preparing_to_stop: Slow down, preparing to stop because a pedestrian is crossing.
safe.slowdown_then_speedup: Slow down to observe a potential pedestrian crossing, then proceed to speed up as it becomes safe to.

not_moving.with_context: Wait at the crosswalk until the pedestrian has crossed.

stopping.with_context: Stop to allow the pedestrian to cross.
stopping.without_context: Slow down and come to a complete stop.

wait_then_move.with_context: Wait for the pedestrian to cross, then proceed.

slowing_down_preparing_to_stop.with_context: Slow down approaching the crosswalk where the pedestrian is crossing.
slowing_down_preparing_to_stop.without_context: Reduce speed and prepare to stop.

slowdown_then_speedup.with_context: Slow down to observe the pedestrian crossing, then accelerate gently once it's clear.

unsafe.stopping: Not stop; keep moving or not reduce speed.
unsafe.wait_then_move: Move immediately without waiting or move fast.
unsafe.slowing_down_preparing_to_stop: Speed up; not reduce speed or prepare to stop.
unsafe.slowdown_then_speedup: Not slow down initially approaching the crosswalk.

stopping.with_context: Maintain your speed or speed up at the crosswalk.
stopping.without_context: Maintain your current speed or speed up.

slowing_down_preparing_to_stop.with_context: Do not reduce speed or increase it as you approach the crosswalk.
slowing_down_preparing_to_stop.without_context: Maintain your speed or increase it.

slowdown_then_speedup.with_context: Do not slow down at the crosswalk; keep your speed.
slowdown_then_speedup.without_context: Do not slow down; keep your current speed.

safe.maintain_safe_speed: Proceed through the crosswalk at a safe speed, being prepared to stop if necessary.
safe.proceed_with_caution: Move through the crosswalk cautiously, observing for any pedestrians.
safe.be_vigilant: Maintain awareness of surroundings while traversing the crosswalk.
safe.slow_down_observe: Slow down as you approach the crosswalk and observe for pedestrians.
safe.yield_if_necessary: Be prepared to yield to pedestrians if any are present.

maintain_safe_speed.with_context: Proceed through the crosswalk at a safe speed, watching for pedestrians.
maintain_safe_speed.without_context: Maintain a safe speed while crossing.

proceed_with_caution.with_context: Carefully proceed through the crosswalk, being alert for pedestrians.

be_vigilant.with_context: Stay alert for pedestrians while traversing the crosswalk.

slow_down_observe.with_context: Slow down as you approach the crosswalk and look for pedestrians.

yield_if_necessary.with_context: Be ready to stop if pedestrians are in the crosswalk.
yield_if_necessary.without_context: Be prepared to yield if necessary.

unsafe.speeding: Proceed through the crosswalk at a high speed.
unsafe.not_paying_attention: Not paying attention to potential pedestrians while crossing.
unsafe.ignoring_pedestrians: Ignore any pedestrians who may be near the crosswalk.
unsafe.no_slow_down: Do not slow down when approaching the crosswalk.

speeding.with_context: Speed through the crosswalk without looking for pedestrians.

not_paying_attention.with_context: Cross the crosswalk without observing for pedestrians.

accelerating.with_context: Accelerate while traversing the crosswalk regardless of surroundings.

ignoring_pedestrians.with_context: Ignore any pedestrians near the crosswalk and proceed without caution.

no_slow_down.with_context: Do not reduce speed when approaching the crosswalk, even if pedestrians are present.
